scripts.format: pnpm exec oxfmt --write client worker client/eslint.config.mjs
scripts.format:check: pnpm exec oxfmt --check client worker client/eslint.config.mjs
scripts.lint:client: pnpm exec oxlint client && pnpm --filter @mail-shell/client lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @mail-shell/client check && pnpm --filter @mail-shell/worker check && cargo check --workspace
scripts.check: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck
